damage.value: three-inch-long teeth d10+3 (close, reach, grabby, messy, 3 piercing, advantage)

system.concept: The 'rage drake' — ten feet of knives, quills, and fury.
system.description: The mighty 'rage drake,' almost ten feet tall and twenty feet from nose to tail-tip. Its jaws are full of knives, blood-red patterns surround its eyes, and a frill of feathered quills sprouts from its neck and runs down its back. Maybe a half-dozen of them stalk the whole Great Wood, and one hasn't been spotted near Stonetop for generations (Tor be praised).

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** They prey mostly on large game (wisents, tal gerdwyr, etc.). They'll attack people, but rarely hunt them.
**Something useful:** They attack people to establish dominance, seeing us as rivals. An appropriate offering or show of obeisance might calm one enough for you to get the hell out of there.

items.name: Roar and unfurl its quills, making even brave warriors quail
